allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const html=fs.readFileSync\(''TaskFlow.html'',''utf-8''\); const s=html.indexOf\(''<script>''\); const e=html.lastIndexOf\(''</script>''\); fs.writeFileSync\(''_temp.js'', html.slice\(s+8,e\)\); console.log\(''OK len=''+html.slice\(s+8,e\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const lines=fs.readFileSync\(''_temp.js'',''utf-8''\).split\(''\\n''\); const start=Math.max\(0,4345\); const end=Math.min\(lines.length,4360\); lines.slice\(start,end\).forEach\(\(l,i\)=>console.log\(\(start+i+1\)+'': ''+l\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const lines=fs.readFileSync\(''js/components/taskDetail.js'',''utf-8''\).split\(''\\n''\); console.log\(''Total lines:'', lines.length\); console.log\(''Last 10 lines:''\); lines.slice\(-10\).forEach\(\(l,i\)=>console.log\(\(lines.length-9+i\)+'': ''+JSON.stringify\(l\)\)\);")
